nasb.text: Now behold, there are the divisions of the priests and the Levites for all the service of the house of God, and every willing man of any skill will be with you in all the work for all kinds of service. The officials also and all the people will be entirely at your command.”

esv.text: And behold the divisions of the priests and the Levites for all the service of the house of God; and with you in all the work will be every willing man who has skill for any kind of service; also the officers and all the people will be wholly at your command.”

cnv.text: 你看，有祭司和利未人的各班次，辦理神殿裡的一切事務；又有各種的巧匠，在各樣的工作上，樂意幫助你，並且眾領袖和所有的人民，都聽從你的一切命令。”

ccb.text: 你看，在上帝殿里司职的各班祭司和利未人已准备就绪，又有各种能工巧匠乐意在各种工作上帮你，众首领和百姓都听你调遣。”
